claim: Evidence agent results with missing, clarify, block, or failed status create PRD readiness blockers via recommendation and missing field checks.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function checks for missing items and problematic recommendations to generate blockers.
evidence.why: Core logic for converting evidence agent results into readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: If evidence result missing field has actionable items, adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker.
evidence.why: Missing evidence triggers blockers, preventing prd_ready from becoming true.

evidence.summary: If recommendation is clarify/blocked/block or verdict/Status is blocked/failed/error, adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blocker.
evidence.why: Clarify, block, and failed recommendations become blockers against PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness iterates required evidence roles and calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each complete result.
evidence.why: Evidence agent blockers are aggregated into the blockers list that determines prd_ready.
Any evidence agent blocker prevents PRD readiness from becoming true.

evidence.summary: Test verifies cross-checker missing field and clarify recommendation create EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers.
evidence.why: Test proves missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and prd_ready becomes false.

evidence.summary: Test verifies evidence agent conflicts (block recommendations) create EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blockers.
evidence.why: Test proves block recommendations prevent PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test verifies that when cross-checker or verifier results are missing, EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers prevent prd_ready.
evidence.why: Test proves missing required agent results block PRD readiness.

risks: If the evidence agent blocking logic has bugs or edge cases, incomplete evidence could incorrectly produce prd_ready true.
If evidence agent results are malformed or missing required fields, blockers might not be generated correctly.

result.notes: Verified: evidence agent results with missing items generate EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blockers; clarify/block/failed recommendations generate EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED blockers; any blocker in the blockers array prevents prd_ready from becoming true (line 738, 750).
